title: Autumnity Waffles
description: Changes pancakes from Autumnity into waffles.
body:
This resourcepack changes the block and item textures to make pancakes in Autumnity mod look like waffles. Renames pancakes to waffles. Support for 6 languages (US English, UK English, German, Russian, Polish and French)

Requires [Autumnity](https://modrinth.com/mod/autumnity/versions)
